eye_holder_craft.title: Craft the Eye Holder (End Remastered — display stand for your collected eyes, found via End Remastered recipes)

eyes_displayed.title: Place the Eye Holder in your base — display the full collection of twelve civilization eyes

subtitle.text: You have carried twelve civilizations through the End. Now you can set them down.

description: End Remastered includes the Eye Holder — a craftable display block
that holds and shows your collected eyes.
This is not a gameplay mechanic. It is a documentation mechanic.
You have been collecting these eyes since Ch09.
Each eye is an inheritance from a civilization that failed.
The Eye Holder lets you look at them all at once.
Black Eye — The Stricken. Lost Eye — The Sacrificed.
Cold Eye — The Frozen. Rogue Eye — The Collapsed.
Cryptic Eye — The Encrypted. Magical Eye — The Corrupted.
Corrupted Eye — The Infected. Cursed Eye — The Cursed.
Old Eye — The Oldest. Wither Eye — The Withered.
Guardian Eye — The Drowned. Nether Eye — The Burned.
Twelve endings. You are the thirteenth option.
→ Display the full collection in your base [check]
